name: The Address Jumeirah Resort and Spa
researcher_notes: Developer attribution: Multiple sources (Bayut, Luxhabitat, jbr-dubai.ae, propsearch.ae) attribute the development to Emaar Properties and Emaar Hospitality Group. The harness brief lists 'Dubai Holding' as developer — this appears to be an error or confusion with the JBR master-community manager (Dubai Holding Communities / DHCM). The building itself is an Emaar/Emaar Hospitality Group product. Flagged for audit.

The development is known under several names across portals: 'The Address Jumeirah Resort and Spa', 'The Address Residences Jumeirah Resort and Spa', 'Address Beach Resort', and 'Address JBR'. All refer to the same twin-tower complex at the end of Jumeirah Beach Walk.

Two towers are commonly referenced: Jumeirah Gate Tower 1 (residential/serviced apartments) and Jumeirah Gate Tower 2 (also residential/serviced apartments). The harness listing only references Tower 1 but Tower 2 also trades actively on portals.

Completion: Construction began September 2016; completed February 2021 per Propsearch. Bayut states 'launched 2016, completed 2020' — minor discrepancy, likely soft vs hard completion. Using February 2021 as the more granular source.

Height discrepancy across sources: Bayut/brochure state 310 m / 1,017 ft; Propsearch states 303 m / 994 ft; Autism Travel states 301 m. The official brochure (Source 4) states 310 m. Using 310 m as primary figure.

ROI figures: jbr-dubai.ae (Source 3) cites 6.7% average and 10% maximum ROI. These are from a third-party agent site and are not independently verified. Schmidt & Partner (Source 15) places Dubai Marina broadly at 6.5–8% gross yield. Branded waterfront trophy buildings carry higher service charges (AED 50–90 psf/yr per Source 16) which compress net yields. ROI figures presented as indicative only.
Golden Visa eligibility: Units priced above AED 2 million qualify per UAE investor visa rules (Source 16). Many listed units exceed this threshold.
The Spa at Address Beach Resort is located on Level 75 and holds the Guinness World Record for highest outdoor infinity pool in a building in the world (Source 8).
The development sits on the last available land plot on Jumeirah Beach Walk, providing a scarcity argument (Source 4, Source 7).
School and healthcare distances are described qualitatively ('within 15-minute drive') in sources; exact distances not confirmed and are not stated in this file.
Service charges are paid to Emaar as district cooling supplier per Bayut (Source 1); exact annual psf rate not publicly confirmed in sources.

overview.full_name: The Address Residences Jumeirah Resort and Spa
overview.type: Mixed-use branded residential and hotel development
overview.interior_theme: La Dolce Vita — pastel palette, Italian-inspired, smart home technology
overview.distinguishing_feature: Two elliptical towers connected at ground podium and summit via link bridges; central void increases daylight and views; Guinness World Record highest outdoor infinity pool

location_connectivity.plot_note: Located on the last available land plot on Jumeirah Beach Walk at the point where Dubai Marina meets the sea
location_connectivity.road_access: Direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road
location_connectivity.tram: Dubai Tram stops serve JBR; nearest stop within walking distance
location_connectivity.metro: DMCC Metro Station (Red Line) approximately 6-minute drive per Bayut
location_connectivity.bus: Jumeirah Beach Residence 2 Bus Station approximately 3-minute drive; Bus 8, Bus 84, Bus N55
location_connectivity.airport: Dubai International Airport (DXB) approximately 27 minutes by car / taxi (21.2 miles road distance per Rome2Rio)

pools: Rooftop infinity pool (Level 77) — Guinness World Record highest outdoor infinity pool
Cascading interconnected pools in landscaped terraces
wellness: The Spa at Address Beach Resort (Level 75) — 9 treatment rooms, steam room, sauna, couples suite
shared_amenities.parking: Covered parking; minimum one dedicated slot per unit
shared_amenities.elevators: Multiple high-speed elevators; private elevators available

retail_and_entertainment: The Walk at JBR (2 km beachfront boulevard)
nearby_infrastructure.schools_nearby_qualitative: Several educational institutions within approximately 15-minute drive including British Orchard Nursery (nearby) and Dubai British School
nearby_infrastructure.healthcare_nearby_qualitative: NMC Royal Hospital within approximately 15-minute drive
business_hubs_nearby: DIFC / Downtown Dubai (accessible via Sheikh Zayed Road)

investment_data.indicative_roi_range: 6.7%–10% gross (source: jbr-dubai.ae agent site; treat as indicative)
investment_data.jbr_area_gross_yield_context: Dubai Marina / JBR broadly 6.5%–8% gross per Schmidt & Partner 2026 analysis
investment_data.branded_premium_note: Branded residences under Address Hotels + Resorts typically command a price premium and higher service charges vs non-branded. Service charges for trophy waterfront branded buildings estimated AED 50–90 psf/yr (Source 16). Net yields will be materially lower than gross.

asking_price_range_observed_aed.penthouse: AED 120M reported for 10,000 sqft penthouse (floors 73–75, December 2022)

investment_data.price_per_sqft_observed_aed: approximately AED 3,966–AED 5,569 per sqft (portal listings, May 2026)
investment_data.scarcity_note: Built on the last available land plot on Jumeirah Beach Walk; no comparable beachfront twin-tower development can be replicated in this location

developer_profile.brand_partner: Address Hotels + Resorts (established 2008 by Mohamed Alabbar)
developer_profile.track_record: Emaar is one of the world's largest real estate developers; delivered Burj Khalifa, The Dubai Mall, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and multiple Address-branded properties. Address Hotels + Resorts portfolio spans Downtown Dubai, Dubai Mall, Dubai Marina, and international locations.
developer_profile.note_on_harness_developer_field: Harness brief lists 'Dubai Holding' — JBR is managed by Dubai Holding Communities (DHCM) as master community operator, but the Address towers were developed and are operated by Emaar/Emaar Hospitality Group. Flagged for audit.

prompt_data_overrides.sub_community: Jumeirah Gate Tower 1, The Address Jumeirah Resort and Spa, Jumeirah Beach Residence, Dubai

investment_overrides.notes: Tower 1 is the primary tower referenced in harness listings. Units range from 1BR to 5BR. Active resale market observed on PropertyFinder and SquareYards. Asking prices observed at AED 3,966–AED 5,569 per sqft. Both furnished (serviced) and unfurnished (residential) units available.
investment_overrides.furnished_options: Both fully furnished serviced apartments and unfurnished residential apartments available

sales_talking_points.headline: Jumeirah Gate Tower 1 — Address-branded beachfront living on JBR's last land plot
sales_talking_points.view_premium: High-floor units command Arabian Gulf, Palm Jumeirah, Bluewaters Island, and Dubai Marina views
sales_talking_points.lifestyle: Residents access full 5-star hotel amenities including world-record rooftop infinity pool, Level 75 spa, multiple F&B outlets, and 100m direct beach access
sales_talking_points.investment: Freehold ownership; Golden Visa eligible above AED 2M; branded residence premium supports resale liquidity; active secondary market

prompt_data_overrides.sub_community: Jumeirah Gate Tower 2, The Address Residences Jumeirah Resort and Spa, Jumeirah Beach Residence, Dubai

investment_overrides.notes: Tower 2 also trades actively on portals (SquareYards, Luxhabitat). Not referenced in harness listings but part of the same twin-tower complex sharing all amenities.
investment_overrides.furnished_options: Both furnished and unfurnished units available

sales_talking_points.headline: Jumeirah Gate Tower 2 — same world-class Address amenities, same iconic JBR beachfront address
sales_talking_points.note: Shares all amenities with Tower 1 via connected podium and sky bridge

development_level.headline_stats: 77 floors, 310 metres, 1,138 total units (217 hotel + 443 serviced + 478 residential), Guinness World Record highest outdoor infinity pool, 100m direct beach access, last land plot on Jumeirah Beach Walk
development_level.scarcity_argument: The Address JBR occupies the very last developable land plot on Jumeirah Beach Walk — no future development can replicate this beachfront position where Dubai Marina meets the open sea. Supply is permanently capped.
development_level.lifestyle_pitch: Wake up to Arabian Gulf views, walk to JBR Beach in minutes, dine at rooftop restaurants with 360-degree skyline panoramas, unwind at the world's highest outdoor infinity pool or the Level 75 spa. The Walk, Ain Dubai, and Dubai Marina are all on your doorstep — resort living with city connectivity.
development_level.investment_pitch: Freehold ownership in one of Dubai's most liquid branded-residence markets. Units above AED 2M qualify for UAE Golden Visa. Address Hotels + Resorts brand management supports rental demand from hotel guests and short-stay visitors. Indicative gross yields of 6.7%–8% cited across JBR/Marina comparable data. Zero income tax and zero capital gains tax on Dubai property.
development_level.objection_handling: Service charges on branded trophy buildings are higher than standard residential — budget AED 50–90 psf/yr and verify actual charges before committing. Net yields will be lower than gross. However, the brand premium, resale liquidity, and lifestyle quality justify the cost differential for buyers seeking a flagship Dubai address.

jumeirah_gate_tower_1.headline: The most actively traded tower in the Address JBR complex — strong secondary market, full hotel amenity access, freehold beachfront ownership

jumeirah_gate_tower_2.headline: Identical amenity access to Tower 1 via shared podium — same Address brand, same beach, same skyline views

Walking distance to The Walk at JBR, JBR Beach, The Beach Mall, Dubai Marina Walk, and Bluewaters Island / Ain Dubai.

distances.schools_healthcare: Key institutions within approximately 15-minute drive (qualitative; exact distances unverified)

community_amenities: Rooftop infinity pool (Level 77) — Guinness World Record highest outdoor infinity pool
The Spa at Address Beach Resort (Level 75) — 9 treatment rooms, steam, sauna, couples suite
Cascading landscaped pools at podium level
Smart home technology (automated climate, lighting, touch switches)

retail.name: The Walk at JBR
retail.type: Beachfront retail and dining boulevard (~2 km)

investment.projected_roi_percent: 6.7%–8% gross indicative (jbr-dubai.ae cites 6.7% average / 10% max; Schmidt & Partner places JBR/Marina at 6.5%–8% gross for 2026). Net yields materially lower after branded service charges (est. AED 50–90 psf/yr) and management costs.
investment.branded_premium_note: Address Hotels + Resorts brand management by Emaar Hospitality Group. Branded residences command a price premium and benefit from hotel-standard services and rental programme access. Higher service charges than non-branded buildings — verify actual charges before purchase. Resale liquidity supported by strong brand recognition and active secondary market.

sales_talking_points.unique_position: Last land plot on Jumeirah Beach Walk — irreplaceable beachfront address that cannot be replicated
sales_talking_points.world_record: Guinness World Record: highest outdoor infinity pool in a building in the world (Level 77)
sales_talking_points.scale: 77 floors, 310 metres, twin towers connected by sky bridge — one of Dubai's most recognisable skyline landmarks
sales_talking_points.lifestyle: 5-star hotel amenities for residents: rooftop pool, Level 75 spa, multiple restaurants, kids' club, 100m beach access, concierge, valet
sales_talking_points.views: Panoramic views of Arabian Gulf, Palm Jumeirah, Bluewaters Island / Ain Dubai, and Dubai Marina skyline from floor-to-ceiling windows
sales_talking_points.connectivity: Direct Sheikh Zayed Road access; DMCC Metro (Red Line) ~6 min drive; Dubai Tram walkable; DXB airport ~27 min
sales_talking_points.investment: Freehold; Golden Visa eligible (AED 2M+); zero UAE income and capital gains tax; active secondary market; branded residence premium
sales_talking_points.interiors: Killa Design interiors — marble, natural wood, smart home tech, premium appliances, La Dolce Vita theme

prompt_data.developer_track_record: Emaar Properties (est. 1997) is one of the world's largest real estate developers, responsible for Burj Khalifa, The Dubai Mall, Downtown Dubai, and Dubai Marina. Address Hotels + Resorts (est. 2008) is Emaar's luxury hospitality brand with properties across Dubai and internationally. The Address JBR was delivered February 2021 following a September 2016 construction start.

audit_flags: DEVELOPER_MISMATCH: Harness brief specifies 'Dubai Holding' as developer. All research sources attribute the development to Emaar Properties and Emaar Hospitality Group. Dubai Holding Communities (DHCM) manages JBR as master community operator but did not develop the Address towers. Requires client confirmation before publishing.

ROI_UNVERIFIED: Gross ROI figures (6.7% avg, 10% max) sourced from jbr-dubai.ae, a third-party agent marketing site. Not independently verified against DLD transaction data. Presented as indicative only.

SERVICE_CHARGE_EXACT_RATE_MISSING: Exact annual service charge per sqft for this specific building not confirmed in sources. Range of AED 50–90 psf/yr used from general branded waterfront trophy building benchmarks (Source 16).
SCHOOL_DISTANCES_UNVERIFIED: School and healthcare distances described qualitatively ('within 15-minute drive') from jbr-dubai.ae. Exact distances not confirmed.
HEIGHT_DISCREPANCY: Sources cite 301m, 303m, and 310m. Official brochure (Source 4) states 310m / 77 floors. Used 310m as primary.

TOWER_2_NOT_IN_HARNESS_LISTINGS: Jumeirah Gate Tower 2 is included in sub_developments for completeness as it is part of the same complex and trades actively, but was not in the original harness listing brief.
RENTAL_YIELD_DATA_SPARSE: No DLD-sourced transaction-level rental yield data available in sources for this specific building.
COMPLETION_DATE_MINOR_DISCREPANCY: Bayut states 2020 completion; Propsearch states February 2021. February 2021 used as more granular source.
